You are working on the wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 25.41 (commit: 1281a8b6).

## Issue to Resolve

Improve wording of no connection message
We use the strings "No network available" (title) and "There is no network available" (message) together in several places when we detect there's no network connection. As mentioned [here](https://github.com/wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android/pull/21275#discussion_r1790413203), this is redundant and unhelpful. We should use better wording, or simply use only the title string and no message.

  5→import com.tenor.android.core.model.impl.Result

  7→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.MediaItem
  8→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.MediaItem.Identifier.GifMediaIdentifier
  9→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.MediaType.IMAGE
 10→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult.Empty
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult.Failure
 13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult.Success
 14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringRes
 15→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringText
 16→import org.wordpress.android.util.NetworkUtilsWrapper
 17→import org.wordpress.android.util.UriUtilsWrapper
 18→import javax.inject.Inject
 19→import kotlin.coroutines.resume
 20→import kotlin.coroutines.suspendCoroutine
 21→
 22→class GifMediaDataSource
 23→@Inject constructor(
 24→    private val context: Context,
 25→    private val tenorClient: TenorGifClient,
 26→    private val uriUtilsWrapper: UriUtilsWrapper,
 27→    private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper
 28→) : MediaSource {
 29→    private var nextPosition: Int = 0
 30→    private val items = mutableListOf<MediaItem>()
 31→    private var lastFilter: String? = null
 32→
 33→    override suspend fun load(forced: Boolean, loadMore: Boolean, filter: String?): MediaLoadingResult {
 34→        if (!loadMore) {
 35→            lastFilter = filter
 36→            items.clear()
 37→            nextPosition = 0
 38→        }
 39→
 40→        if (!networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()) {
 41→            return Failure(
 42→                UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_title),
 43→                htmlSubtitle = UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_message),
 44→                image = R.drawable.img_illustration_cloud_off_152dp,
 45→                data = items
 46→            )
 47→        }
 48→
 49→        return if (!filter.isNullOrBlank()) {
 50→            suspendCoroutine { cont ->
 51→                tenorClient.search(filter,
 52→                    nextPosition,
 53→                    PAGE_SIZE,
 54→                    onSuccess = { response ->
 55→                        val gifList = response.results.map { it.toMediaItem() }
 56→
 57→                        items.addAll(gifList)
 58→                        val newPosition = response.next.toIntOrNull() ?: 0
 59→                        val hasMore = newPosition > nextPosition
 60→                        nextPosition = newPosition
 61→                        val result = if (items.isNotEmpty()) {
 62→                            Success(items.toList(), hasMore)
 63→                        } else {
 64→                            Empty(UiStringRes(R.string.gif_picker_empty_search_list))
 65→                        }
 66→                        cont.resume(result)
 67→                    },
 68→                    onFailure = {
 69→                        val errorMessage = it?.message
 70→                            ?: context.getString(R.string.gif_list_search_returned_unknown_error)
 71→                        cont.resume(
 72→                            Failure(
 73→                                UiStringRes(R.string.media_loading_failed),
 74→                                htmlSubtitle = UiStringText(errorMessage),
 75→                                image = R.drawable.img_illustration_cloud_off_152dp,
 76→                                data = items
 77→                            )
 78→                        )
 79→                    }
 80→                )
 81→            }
 82→        } else {
 83→            buildDefaultScreen()
 84→        }
 85→    }
 86→
 87→    private fun buildDefaultScreen(): MediaLoadingResult {
 88→        val title = UiStringRes(R.string.gif_picker_initial_empty_text)
 89→        return Empty(
 90→            title,
 91→            null,
 92→            R.drawable.img_illustration_media_105dp,
 93→            R.drawable.img_tenor_100dp,

 10→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.Dispatcher
 11→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.generated.MediaActionBuilder
 12→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.MediaModel
 13→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 14→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.MediaStore
 15→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.MediaStore.FetchMediaListPayload
 16→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.MediaStore.OnMediaListFetched

 20→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.MediaItem.Identifier.RemoteId
 21→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.MediaType
 22→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.MediaType.AUDIO
 23→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.MediaType.DOCUMENT

 26→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult
 27→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult.Empty
 28→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult.Failure
 29→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringRes

 33→import javax.inject.Inject
 34→import javax.inject.Named
 35→import kotlin.coroutines.Continuation
 36→import kotlin.coroutines.resume
 37→import kotlin.coroutines.suspendCoroutine
 38→
 39→@Suppress("LongParameterList")
 40→class MediaLibraryDataSource(
 41→    private val mediaStore: MediaStore,
 42→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
 43→    @param:Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 44→    private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper,
 45→    private val dateTimeUtilsWrapper: DateTimeUtilsWrapper,
 46→    private val siteModel: SiteModel,
 47→    override val mediaTypes: Set<MediaType>
 48→) : MediaSource, MediaSourceWithTypes {
 49→    init {
 50→        dispatcher.register(this)
 51→    }
 52→
 53→    private var loadContinuations = mutableMapOf<MimeType.Type, Continuation<OnMediaListFetched>>()
 54→
 55→    override suspend fun load(
 56→        forced: Boolean,
 57→        loadMore: Boolean,
 58→        filter: String?
 59→    ): MediaLoadingResult {
 60→        if (!networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()) {
 61→            return Failure(
 62→                UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_title),
 63→                htmlSubtitle = UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_message),
 64→                image = R.drawable.img_illustration_cloud_off_152dp,
 65→                data = if (loadMore) get(mediaTypes, filter) else listOf()
 66→            )
 67→        }
 68→        return withContext(bgDispatcher) {
 69→            val loadingResults = mediaTypes.map { mediaType ->
 70→                async {
 71→                    loadPage(
 72→                        siteModel,
 73→                        loadMore,
 74→                        mediaType.toMimeType()
 75→                    )
 76→                }
 77→            }.awaitAll()
 78→
 79→            var error: String? = null
 80→            var hasMore = false
 81→            for (loadingResult in loadingResults) {
 82→                if (loadingResult.isError) {
 83→                    error = loadingResult.error.message
 84→                    break
 85→                } else {
 86→                    hasMore = hasMore || loadingResult.canLoadMore
 87→                }
 88→            }
 89→            if (error != null) {
 90→                Failure(
 91→                    UiStringRes(R.string.media_loading_failed),
 92→                    htmlSubtitle = UiStringText(error),
 93→                    image = R.drawable.img_illustration_cloud_off_152dp,
 94→                    data = if (loadMore) get(mediaTypes, filter) else listOf()
 95→                )
 96→            } else {
 97→                val data = get(mediaTypes, filter)
 98→                if (filter.isNullOrEmpty() || data.isNotEmpty()) {
 99→                    MediaLoadingResult.Success(data, hasMore)
100→                } else {
101→                    Empty(
102→                        UiStringRes(R.string.media_empty_search_list),
103→                        image = R.drawable.img_illustration_empty_results_216dp
104→                    )
105→                }
106→            }
107→        }
108→    }
109→
110→    private suspend fun get(mediaTypes: Set<MediaType>, filter: String?): List<MediaItem> {
111→        return withContext(bgDispatcher) {
112→            mediaTypes.map { mediaType ->
113→                async {
114→                    if (filter == null) {
115→                        getFromDatabase(mediaType)
116→                    } else {
117→                        searchInDatabase(mediaType, filter)
118→                    }
119→                }
120→            }.fold(mutableListOf<MediaItem>()) { result, databaseItems ->
121→                result.addAll(databaseItems.await())
122→                result
123→            }.sortedByDescending { it.dataModified }
124→        }
125→    }
126→
127→    private fun List<MediaModel>.toMediaItems(mediaType: MediaType): List<MediaItem> {
128→        return this.filter { it.url.isNotBlank() }.map { mediaModel ->
129→            MediaItem(
130→                RemoteId(mediaModel.mediaId),
131→                mediaModel.url,
132→                mediaModel.title,
133→                mediaType,
134→                mediaModel.mimeType,
135→                mediaModel.uploadDate?.let { dateTimeUtilsWrapper.dateFromIso8601(it).time } ?: 0L
136→            )
137→        }
138→    }
139→
140→    private fun getFromDatabase(mediaType: MediaType): List<MediaItem> {
141→        return when (mediaType) {
142→            IMAGE -> mediaStore.getSiteImages(siteModel)
143→            VIDEO -> mediaStore.getSiteVideos(siteModel)
144→            AUDIO -> mediaStore.getSiteAudio(siteModel)
145→            DOCUMENT -> mediaStore.getSiteDocuments(siteModel)
146→        }.toMediaItems(mediaType)
147→    }
148→
149→    private fun searchInDatabase(mediaType: MediaType, filter: String): List<MediaItem> {
150→        return when (mediaType) {
151→            IMAGE -> mediaStore.searchSiteImages(siteModel, filter)
152→            VIDEO -> mediaStore.searchSiteVideos(siteModel, filter)
153→            AUDIO -> mediaStore.searchSiteAudio(siteModel, filter)
154→            DOCUMENT -> mediaStore.searchSiteDocuments(siteModel, filter)
155→        }.toMediaItems(mediaType)
156→    }
157→
158→    private suspend fun loadPage(siteModel: SiteModel, loadMore: Boolean, filter: MimeType.Type): OnMediaListFetched =
159→        suspendCoroutine { cont ->
160→            loadContinuations[filter] = cont
161→            val payload = FetchMediaListPayload(
162→                siteModel,
163→                NUM_MEDIA_PER_FETCH,
164→                loadMore,
165→                filter
166→            )
167→            dispatcher.dispatch(MediaActionBuilder.newFetchMediaListAction(payload))
168→        }
169→
170→    private fun MediaType.toMimeType(): MimeType.Type {
171→        return when (this) {
172→            IMAGE -> MimeType.Type.IMAGE
173→            VIDEO -> MimeType.Type.VIDEO
174→            AUDIO -> MimeType.Type.AUDIO
175→            DOCUMENT -> MimeType.Type.APPLICATION
176→        }
177→    }
178→
179→    @Subscribe(threadMode = MAIN)
180→    fun onMediaListFetched(event: OnMediaListFetched) {
181→        loadContinuations[event.mimeType]?.resume(event)
182→        loadContinuations.remove(event.mimeType)
183→    }
184→
185→    companion object {
186→        const val NUM_MEDIA_PER_FETCH = 24
187→    }
188→

193→        @param:Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
194→        private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper,
195→        private val dateTimeUtilsWrapper: DateTimeUtilsWrapper
196→    ) {
197→        fun build(siteModel: SiteModel, mediaTypes: Set<MediaType>) =
198→            MediaLibraryDataSource(
199→                mediaStore,
200→                dispatcher,
201→                bgDispatcher,
202→                networkUtilsWrapper,
203→                dateTimeUtilsWrapper,
204→                siteModel,
205→                mediaTypes
206→            )

208→}

 330→    private suspend fun reloadPages(state: PageListState = REFRESHING, forced: Boolean = false) {
 331→        if (performIfNetworkAvailableAsync {
 332→                _listState.setOnUi(state)
 333→
 334→                val result = pageStore.requestPagesFromServer(site, forced)
 335→                if (result.isError) {
 336→                    _listState.setOnUi(ERROR)
 337→                    showSnackbar(SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.error_refresh_pages)))
 338→                    AppLog.e(PAGES, "An error occurred while fetching the Pages")
 339→                } else {
 340→                    _listState.setOnUi(DONE)
 341→                }
 342→                refreshPages()
 343→            }) else {
 344→            _listState.setOnUi(DONE)
 345→        }

 435→        _previewState.postValue(newState)

 446→    private suspend fun groupedSearch(
 447→        site: SiteModel,
 448→        searchQuery: String
 449→    ): SortedMap<PageListType, List<PageModel>> = withContext(defaultDispatcher) {
 450→        val list = pageStore.search(site, searchQuery)
 451→            .groupBy { PageListType.fromPageStatus(it.status) }
 452→
 453→        return@withContext list.toSortedMap { previous, next ->
 454→            when {
 455→                previous == next -> 0
 456→                previous == PUBLISHED -> -1
 457→                next == PUBLISHED -> 1
 458→                previous == DRAFTS -> -1
 459→                next == DRAFTS -> 1
 460→                previous == SCHEDULED -> -1
 461→                next == SCHEDULED -> 1
 462→                else -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Unexpected page type")
 463→            }
 464→        }
 465→    }

 68→@HiltViewModel
 69→class StatsViewModel
 70→@Inject constructor(
 71→    @Named(LIST_STATS_USE_CASES) private val listUseCases: Map<StatsSection, BaseListUseCase>,
 72→    @Named(UI_THREAD) private val mainDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 73→    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val defaultDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 74→    private val selectedDateProvider: SelectedDateProvider,
 75→    private val statsSectionManager: SelectedSectionManager,
 76→    private val selectedTrafficGranularityManager: SelectedTrafficGranularityManager,
 77→    private val analyticsTracker: AnalyticsTrackerWrapper,
 78→    private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper,
 79→    private val statsSiteProvider: StatsSiteProvider,
 80→    private val statsStore: StatsStore,
 81→    newsCardHandler: NewsCardHandler,
 82→    private val statsModuleActivateUseCase: StatsModuleActivateUseCase,
 83→    private val notificationsTracker: SystemNotificationsTracker,
 84→    private val jetpackBrandingUtils: JetpackBrandingUtils,
 85→    private val jetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil: JetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil,
 86→    private val statsTrafficSubscribersTabsFeatureConfig: StatsTrafficSubscribersTabsFeatureConfig
 87→) : ScopedViewModel(mainDispatcher) {
 88→    private val _isRefreshing = MutableLiveData<Boolean>()
 89→    val isRefreshing: LiveData<Boolean> = _isRefreshing
 90→
 91→    private var isInitialized = false
 92→
 93→    private val _showSnackbarMessage = mergeNotNull(
 94→        listUseCases.values.map { it.snackbarMessage },
 95→        distinct = true,
 96→        singleEvent = true
 97→    )
 98→    val showSnackbarMessage: LiveData<SnackbarMessageHolder> = _showSnackbarMessage
 99→
100→    val siteChanged = statsSiteProvider.siteChanged
101→
102→    val toolbarHasShadow: LiveData<Boolean> = statsSectionManager.liveSelectedSection.mapNullable {
103→        it == StatsSection.INSIGHTS
104→    }
105→
106→    val hideToolbar = newsCardHandler.hideToolbar
107→
108→    val selectedSection = statsSectionManager.liveSelectedSection
109→
110→    private val _statsModuleUiModel = MediatorLiveData<Event<StatsModuleUiModel>>()
111→    val statsModuleUiModel: LiveData<Event<StatsModuleUiModel>> = _statsModuleUiModel
112→
113→    private val _showJetpackPoweredBottomSheet = MutableLiveData<Event<Boolean>>()
114→    val showJetpackPoweredBottomSheet: LiveData<Event<Boolean>> = _showJetpackPoweredBottomSheet
115→
116→    private val _showJetpackOverlay = MutableLiveData<Event<Boolean>>()
117→    val showJetpackOverlay: LiveData<Event<Boolean>> = _showJetpackOverlay
118→
119→    fun start(intent: Intent, restart: Boolean = false) {
120→        val localSiteId = intent.getIntExtra(WordPress.LOCAL_SITE_ID, 0)
121→
122→        val timeframe = intent.getSerializableExtraCompat<StatsTimeframe>(StatsActivity.ARG_DESIRED_TIMEFRAME)
123→        val launchedFrom = intent.getSerializableExtraCompat<StatsLaunchedFrom>(StatsActivity.ARG_LAUNCHED_FROM)
124→        val initialTimeFrame = getInitialTimeFrame(timeframe, launchedFrom)
125→        val initialGranularity = intent.getSerializableExtraCompat<StatsGranularity>(StatsActivity.ARG_GRANULARITY)
126→        val initialSelectedPeriod = intent.getStringExtra(StatsActivity.INITIAL_SELECTED_PERIOD_KEY)
127→        val notificationType = intent.getSerializableExtraCompat<NotificationType>(ARG_NOTIFICATION_TYPE)
128→        start(
129→            localSiteId,
130→            launchedFrom,
131→            initialTimeFrame,
132→            initialSelectedPeriod,
133→            restart,
134→            notificationType,
135→            initialGranularity
136→        )
137→    }
138→
139→    fun onSaveInstanceState(outState: Bundle) {
140→        selectedDateProvider.onSaveInstanceState(outState)
141→    }
142→
143→    fun onRestoreInstanceState(savedState: Bundle?) {
144→        if (savedState != null) {
145→            selectedDateProvider.onRestoreInstanceState(savedState)
146→        } else {
147→            selectedDateProvider.clear()
148→            statsSiteProvider.reset()
149→        }
150→    }
151→
152→    private fun getInitialTimeFrame(timeframe: StatsTimeframe?, launchedFrom: StatsLaunchedFrom?): StatsSection? {
153→        if (statsTrafficSubscribersTabsFeatureConfig.isEnabled() && launchedFrom == StatsLaunchedFrom.LINK) {
154→            setupDeeplinkForTrafficTab(timeframe)
155→        }
156→
157→        return when (timeframe) {
158→            StatsTimeframe.TRAFFIC -> StatsSection.TRAFFIC
159→            StatsTimeframe.INSIGHTS -> StatsSection.INSIGHTS
160→            StatsTimeframe.SUBSCRIBERS -> StatsSection.SUBSCRIBERS
161→            DAY -> StatsSection.DAYS
162→            WEEK -> StatsSection.WEEKS
163→            MONTH -> StatsSection.MONTHS
164→            YEAR -> StatsSection.YEARS
165→            else -> null
166→        }
167→    }
168→
169→    private fun setupDeeplinkForTrafficTab(timeframe: StatsTimeframe?) {
170→        when (timeframe) {
171→            DAY -> selectedTrafficGranularityManager.setSelectedTrafficGranularity(StatsGranularity.DAYS)
172→            WEEK -> selectedTrafficGranularityManager.setSelectedTrafficGranularity(StatsGranularity.WEEKS)
173→            MONTH -> selectedTrafficGranularityManager.setSelectedTrafficGranularity(StatsGranularity.MONTHS)
174→            YEAR -> selectedTrafficGranularityManager.setSelectedTrafficGranularity(StatsGranularity.YEARS)
175→            else -> { /* Do nothing */ }
176→        }
177→    }
178→
179→    @Suppress("ComplexMethod", "LongParameterList")
180→    fun start(
181→        localSiteId: Int,
182→        launchedFrom: StatsLaunchedFrom?,
183→        initialSection: StatsSection?,
184→        initialSelectedPeriod: String?,
185→        restart: Boolean,
186→        notificationType: NotificationType?,
187→        granularity: StatsGranularity? = null
188→    ) {
189→        if (restart) {
190→            selectedDateProvider.clear()
191→        }
192→        // Check if VM is not already initialized
193→        if (!isInitialized || restart) {
194→            isInitialized = true
195→
196→            analyticsTracker.trackStatsAccessed(
197→                site = statsSiteProvider.siteModel,
198→                tapSource = launchedFrom?.value ?: ""
199→            )
200→
201→            initialSection?.let {
202→                statsSectionManager.setSelectedSection(it)
203→
204→                val trafficGranularity = it.toStatsGranularity()
205→                if (statsTrafficSubscribersTabsFeatureConfig.isEnabled() && trafficGranularity != null) {
206→                    selectedTrafficGranularityManager.setSelectedTrafficGranularity(trafficGranularity)
207→                }
208→            }
209→            granularity?.let {
210→                if (it != selectedTrafficGranularityManager.getSelectedTrafficGranularity()) {
211→                    selectedTrafficGranularityManager.setSelectedTrafficGranularity(it)
212→                }
213→            }
214→            updateSelectedSectionByTrafficSubscribersTabFeatureConfig()
215→            trackSectionSelected(statsSectionManager.getSelectedSection())
216→
217→            val initialGranularity = granularity ?: initialSection?.toStatsGranularity()
218→            if (initialGranularity != null && initialSelectedPeriod != null) {
219→                selectedDateProvider.setInitialSelectedPeriod(initialGranularity, initialSelectedPeriod)
220→            }
221→
222→            if (launchedFrom == StatsLaunchedFrom.WIDGET) {
223→                analyticsTracker.track(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.STATS_WIDGET_TAPPED, statsSiteProvider.siteModel)
224→            }
225→
226→            if (notificationType != null) {
227→                notificationsTracker.trackTappedNotification(notificationType)
228→            }
229→        }
230→
231→        _statsModuleUiModel.value = Event(buildShowStatsEnabledViewUiModel())
232→
233→        val siteChanged = statsSiteProvider.start(localSiteId)
234→        if (!isStatsModuleEnabled()) {
235→            _statsModuleUiModel.value = Event(buildShowStatsDisabledViewUiModel())
236→        } else {
237→            if (restart && siteChanged) {
238→                launch {
239→                    listUseCases.forEach { useCase ->
240→                        useCase.value.onCleared()
241→                        useCase.value.refreshData(true)
242→                    }
243→                }
244→            }
245→        }
246→
247→        if (BuildConfig.IS_JETPACK_APP) {
248→            updateRevampedInsights()
249→        }
250→
251→        if (jetpackBrandingUtils.shouldShowJetpackPoweredBottomSheet()) showJetpackPoweredBottomSheet()
252→
253→        if (jetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil.shouldShowFeatureSpecificJetpackOverlay(STATS))
254→            showJetpackOverlay()
255→    }
256→
257→    private fun updateSelectedSectionByTrafficSubscribersTabFeatureConfig() {
258→        if (statsTrafficSubscribersTabsFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
259→            val selectedSection = statsSectionManager.getSelectedSection()
260→            val isSelectedSectionRemoved = selectedSection == StatsSection.DAYS ||
261→                    selectedSection == StatsSection.WEEKS ||
262→                    selectedSection == StatsSection.MONTHS ||
263→                    selectedSection == StatsSection.YEARS
264→
265→            if (isSelectedSectionRemoved) {
266→                // statsTrafficSubscribersTabFeatureConfig has just been enabled. Update the cached selected section.
267→                statsSectionManager.setSelectedSection(StatsSection.TRAFFIC)
268→            }
269→        }
270→    }
271→
272→    private fun showJetpackOverlay() {
273→        _showJetpackOverlay.value = Event(true)
274→    }
275→
276→    private fun showJetpackPoweredBottomSheet() {
277→//        _showJetpackPoweredBottomSheet.value = Event(true)
278→    }
279→
280→    private fun updateRevampedInsights() {
281→        val insightsUseCase = listUseCases[StatsSection.INSIGHTS]
282→        insightsUseCase?.launch(defaultDispatcher) {
283→            val insightTypes = statsStore.getAddedInsights(statsSiteProvider.siteModel)
284→            if (insightTypes.containsAll(DEFAULT_INSIGHTS)) { // means not upgraded to new insights
285→                // The new set of default cards is added at the top of their list and preserve their additions
286→                val addedInsightTypes = insightTypes - DEFAULT_INSIGHTS.toSet()
287→                val updateInsightTypes: MutableSet<InsightType> = mutableSetOf()
288→                updateInsightTypes.addAll(JETPACK_DEFAULT_INSIGHTS)
289→                updateInsightTypes.addAll(addedInsightTypes)
290→                statsStore.updateTypes(statsSiteProvider.siteModel, updateInsightTypes.toList())
291→                insightsUseCase.loadData()
292→            }
293→        }
294→    }
295→
296→    private fun isStatsModuleEnabled() =
297→        statsSiteProvider.siteModel.isActiveModuleEnabled("stats") || statsSiteProvider.siteModel.isWPCom
298→
299→    private fun loadData(executeLoading: suspend () -> Unit) = launch {
300→        _isRefreshing.value = true
301→
302→        executeLoading()
303→
304→        _isRefreshing.value = false
305→    }
306→
307→    @SuppressLint("NullSafeMutableLiveData")
308→    fun onPullToRefresh() {
309→        _showSnackbarMessage.value = null
310→        statsSiteProvider.clear()
311→        if (networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()) {
312→            loadData {
313→                val baseListUseCase = listUseCases[statsSectionManager.getSelectedSection()]
314→                baseListUseCase?.refreshTypes()
315→                baseListUseCase?.refreshData(true)
316→            }
317→        } else {
318→            _isRefreshing.value = false
319→            _showSnackbarMessage.value = SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_title))
320→        }
321→    }
322→
323→    fun onSiteChanged() {
324→        if (!isStatsModuleEnabled()) {
325→            _statsModuleUiModel.value = Event(buildShowStatsDisabledViewUiModel())
326→        } else {
327→            _statsModuleUiModel.value = Event(buildShowStatsEnabledViewUiModel())
328→            loadData {
329→                listUseCases.values.forEach {
330→                    it.refreshData(true)
331→                }
332→            }
333→        }
334→    }
335→
336→    fun onSectionSelected(statsSection: StatsSection) {
337→        statsSectionManager.setSelectedSection(statsSection)
338→
339→        listUseCases[statsSection]?.onListSelected()
340→
341→        trackSectionSelected(statsSection)
342→    }
343→
344→    private fun trackSectionSelected(statsSection: StatsSection) {
345→        when (statsSection) {
346→            StatsSection.TRAFFIC -> analyticsTracker.trackWithGranularity(
347→                STATS_PERIOD_ACCESSED,
348→                selectedTrafficGranularityManager.getSelectedTrafficGranularity()
349→            )
350→
351→            StatsSection.INSIGHTS -> analyticsTracker.track(STATS_INSIGHTS_ACCESSED)
352→
353→            StatsSection.SUBSCRIBERS -> analyticsTracker.track(STATS_SUBSCRIBERS_ACCESSED)
354→
355→            StatsSection.DAYS -> analyticsTracker.trackWithGranularity(
356→                STATS_PERIOD_DAYS_ACCESSED,
357→                StatsGranularity.DAYS
358→            )
359→
360→            StatsSection.WEEKS -> analyticsTracker.trackWithGranularity(
361→                STATS_PERIOD_WEEKS_ACCESSED,
362→                StatsGranularity.WEEKS
363→            )
364→
365→            StatsSection.MONTHS -> analyticsTracker.trackWithGranularity(
366→                STATS_PERIOD_MONTHS_ACCESSED,
367→                StatsGranularity.MONTHS
368→            )
369→
370→            StatsSection.YEARS -> analyticsTracker.trackWithGranularity(
371→                STATS_PERIOD_YEARS_ACCESSED,
372→                StatsGranularity.YEARS
373→            )
374→
375→            StatsSection.ANNUAL_STATS -> Unit // Do nothing
376→            StatsSection.DETAIL -> Unit // Do nothing
377→            StatsSection.INSIGHT_DETAIL -> Unit // Do nothing
378→            StatsSection.TOTAL_LIKES_DETAIL -> Unit // Do nothing
379→            StatsSection.TOTAL_COMMENTS_DETAIL -> Unit // Do nothing
380→            StatsSection.TOTAL_FOLLOWERS_DETAIL -> Unit // Do nothing
381→        }
382→    }
383→
384→    @SuppressLint("NullSafeMutableLiveData")
385→    override fun onCleared() {
386→        super.onCleared()
387→        _showSnackbarMessage.value = null
388→    }
389→
390→    fun onEnableStatsModuleClick() {
391→        _statsModuleUiModel.value = Event(buildShowStatsActivatingViewUiModel())
392→        launch {
393→            when (statsModuleActivateUseCase.postActivateStatsModule(statsSiteProvider.siteModel)) {
394→                is NetworkUnavailable -> {
395→                    _statsModuleUiModel.value = Event(buildShowStatsDisabledViewUiModel())
396→                    _showSnackbarMessage.value = SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_title))
397→                }
398→                is RemoteRequestFailure -> {
399→                    _statsModuleUiModel.value = Event(buildShowStatsDisabledViewUiModel())
400→                    _showSnackbarMessage.value =
401→                        SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.stats_disabled_enable_stats_error_message))
402→                }
403→                is Success -> {
404→                    _statsModuleUiModel.value = Event(buildShowStatsEnabledViewUiModel())
405→                }
406→            }
407→        }
408→    }
409→
410→    private fun buildShowStatsEnabledViewUiModel() = StatsModuleUiModel(disabledStatsViewVisible = false)
411→
412→    private fun buildShowStatsDisabledViewUiModel() =
413→        StatsModuleUiModel(disabledStatsViewVisible = true, disabledStatsProgressVisible = false)
414→
415→    private fun buildShowStatsActivatingViewUiModel() =
416→        StatsModuleUiModel(disabledStatsViewVisible = true, disabledStatsProgressVisible = true)
417→
418→    data class DateSelectorUiModel(
419→        val isVisible: Boolean = false,
420→        val isGranularitySpinnerVisible: Boolean = false,
421→        val date: String? = null,
422→        val timeZone: String? = null,
423→        val enableSelectPrevious: Boolean = false,
424→        val enableSelectNext: Boolean = false
425→    )
426→
427→    data class StatsModuleUiModel(
428→        val disabledStatsViewVisible: Boolean = false,
429→        val disabledStatsProgressVisible: Boolean = false
430→    )
431→}

27→class StatsDetailViewModel
28→@Inject constructor(
29→    @Named(UI_THREAD) mainDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
30→    @Named(BLOCK_DETAIL_USE_CASE) private val detailUseCase: BaseListUseCase,
31→    private val statsSiteProvider: StatsSiteProvider,
32→    private val statsPostProvider: StatsPostProvider,
33→    private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper,
34→    private val analyticsTrackerWrapper: AnalyticsTrackerWrapper,

36→) : ScopedViewModel(mainDispatcher) {

39→

42→        distinct = true,

44→    )

46→
47→    private val _showJetpackOverlay = MutableLiveData<Event<Boolean>>()
48→    val showJetpackOverlay: LiveData<Event<Boolean>> = _showJetpackOverlay
49→
50→    fun init(
51→        postId: Long,
52→        postType: String,
53→        postTitle: String,
54→        postUrl: String?
55→    ) {
56→        analyticsTrackerWrapper.trackStatsAccessed(
57→            statsSiteProvider.siteModel,
58→            StatsLaunchedFrom.POSTS.value
59→        )
60→
61→        statsPostProvider.init(postId, postType, postTitle, postUrl)
62→
63→        if (jetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil.shouldShowFeatureSpecificJetpackOverlay(
64→                JetpackOverlayConnectedFeature.STATS)) {

66→        }

69→    private fun showJetpackOverlay() {
70→        _showJetpackOverlay.value = Event(true)
71→    }

75→            detailUseCase.refreshData(true)
76→            _isRefreshing.value = false
77→        }
78→    }

 78→                .data(avatarUrl)
 79→                .error(R.drawable.ic_user_placeholder_primary_24)
 80→                .crossfade(true)

 22→class GifMediaDataSource
 23→@Inject constructor(
 24→    private val context: Context,
 25→    private val tenorClient: TenorGifClient,
 26→    private val uriUtilsWrapper: UriUtilsWrapper,
 27→    private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper
 28→) : MediaSource {
 29→    private var nextPosition: Int = 0
 30→    private val items = mutableListOf<MediaItem>()
 31→    private var lastFilter: String? = null
 32→
 33→    override suspend fun load(forced: Boolean, loadMore: Boolean, filter: String?): MediaLoadingResult {
 34→        if (!loadMore) {
 35→            lastFilter = filter
 36→            items.clear()
 37→            nextPosition = 0
 38→        }
 39→
 40→        if (!networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()) {
 41→            return Failure(
 42→                UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_title),
 43→                htmlSubtitle = UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_message),
 44→                image = R.drawable.img_illustration_cloud_off_152dp,
 45→                data = items
 46→            )
 47→        }
 48→
 49→        return if (!filter.isNullOrBlank()) {
 50→            suspendCoroutine { cont ->
 51→                tenorClient.search(filter,
 52→                    nextPosition,
 53→                    PAGE_SIZE,
 54→                    onSuccess = { response ->
 55→                        val gifList = response.results.map { it.toMediaItem() }
 56→
 57→                        items.addAll(gifList)
 58→                        val newPosition = response.next.toIntOrNull() ?: 0
 59→                        val hasMore = newPosition > nextPosition
 60→                        nextPosition = newPosition
 61→                        val result = if (items.isNotEmpty()) {
 62→                            Success(items.toList(), hasMore)
 63→                        } else {
 64→                            Empty(UiStringRes(R.string.gif_picker_empty_search_list))
 65→                        }
 66→                        cont.resume(result)
 67→                    },
 68→                    onFailure = {
 69→                        val errorMessage = it?.message
 70→                            ?: context.getString(R.string.gif_list_search_returned_unknown_error)
 71→                        cont.resume(
 72→                            Failure(
 73→                                UiStringRes(R.string.media_loading_failed),
 74→                                htmlSubtitle = UiStringText(errorMessage),
 75→                                image = R.drawable.img_illustration_cloud_off_152dp,
 76→                                data = items
 77→                            )
 78→                        )
 79→                    }
 80→                )
 81→            }
 82→        } else {
 83→            buildDefaultScreen()
 84→        }
 85→    }
 86→
 87→    private fun buildDefaultScreen(): MediaLoadingResult {
 88→        val title = UiStringRes(R.string.gif_picker_initial_empty_text)
 89→        return Empty(
 90→            title,
 91→            null,
 92→            R.drawable.img_illustration_media_105dp,
 93→            R.drawable.img_tenor_100dp,
 94→            UiStringRes(R.string.gif_powered_by_tenor)
 95→        )
 96→    }
 97→
 98→    private fun Result.toMediaItem() = MediaItem(
 99→        identifier = GifMediaIdentifier(
100→            uriUtilsWrapper.parse(urlFromCollectionFormat(MediaCollectionFormat.GIF)),
101→            title
102→        ),
103→        url = uriUtilsWrapper.parse(urlFromCollectionFormat(MediaCollectionFormat.GIF_NANO)).toString(),
104→        type = IMAGE,
105→        dataModified = 0
106→    )
107→
108→    private fun Result.urlFromCollectionFormat(format: String) =
109→        medias.firstOrNull()?.get(format)?.url
110→
111→    companion object {
112→        private const val PAGE_SIZE = 36
113→    }
114→}

 39→@Suppress("LongParameterList")
 40→class MediaLibraryDataSource(
 41→    private val mediaStore: MediaStore,
 42→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
 43→    @param:Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 44→    private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper,
 45→    private val dateTimeUtilsWrapper: DateTimeUtilsWrapper,
 46→    private val siteModel: SiteModel,
 47→    override val mediaTypes: Set<MediaType>
 48→) : MediaSource, MediaSourceWithTypes {
 49→    init {
 50→        dispatcher.register(this)
 51→    }
 52→
 53→    private var loadContinuations = mutableMapOf<MimeType.Type, Continuation<OnMediaListFetched>>()
 54→
 55→    override suspend fun load(
 56→        forced: Boolean,
 57→        loadMore: Boolean,
 58→        filter: String?
 59→    ): MediaLoadingResult {
 60→        if (!networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()) {
 61→            return Failure(
 62→                UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_title),
 63→                htmlSubtitle = UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_message),
 64→                image = R.drawable.img_illustration_cloud_off_152dp,
 65→                data = if (loadMore) get(mediaTypes, filter) else listOf()
 66→            )
 67→        }
 68→        return withContext(bgDispatcher) {
 69→            val loadingResults = mediaTypes.map { mediaType ->
 70→                async {
 71→                    loadPage(
 72→                        siteModel,
 73→                        loadMore,
 74→                        mediaType.toMimeType()
 75→                    )
 76→                }
 77→            }.awaitAll()
 78→
 79→            var error: String? = null
 80→            var hasMore = false
 81→            for (loadingResult in loadingResults) {
 82→                if (loadingResult.isError) {
 83→                    error = loadingResult.error.message
 84→                    break
 85→                } else {
 86→                    hasMore = hasMore || loadingResult.canLoadMore
 87→                }
 88→            }
 89→            if (error != null) {
 90→                Failure(
 91→                    UiStringRes(R.string.media_loading_failed),
 92→                    htmlSubtitle = UiStringText(error),
 93→                    image = R.drawable.img_illustration_cloud_off_152dp,
 94→                    data = if (loadMore) get(mediaTypes, filter) else listOf()
 95→                )
 96→            } else {
 97→                val data = get(mediaTypes, filter)
 98→                if (filter.isNullOrEmpty() || data.isNotEmpty()) {
 99→                    MediaLoadingResult.Success(data, hasMore)
100→                } else {
101→                    Empty(
102→                        UiStringRes(R.string.media_empty_search_list),
103→                        image = R.drawable.img_illustration_empty_results_216dp
104→                    )
105→                }
106→            }
107→        }
108→    }
109→
110→    private suspend fun get(mediaTypes: Set<MediaType>, filter: String?): List<MediaItem> {
111→        return withContext(bgDispatcher) {
112→            mediaTypes.map { mediaType ->
113→                async {
114→                    if (filter == null) {
115→                        getFromDatabase(mediaType)
116→                    } else {
117→                        searchInDatabase(mediaType, filter)
118→                    }
119→                }
120→            }.fold(mutableListOf<MediaItem>()) { result, databaseItems ->
121→                result.addAll(databaseItems.await())
122→                result
123→            }.sortedByDescending { it.dataModified }
124→        }
125→    }
126→
127→    private fun List<MediaModel>.toMediaItems(mediaType: MediaType): List<MediaItem> {
128→        return this.filter { it.url.isNotBlank() }.map { mediaModel ->
129→            MediaItem(
130→                RemoteId(mediaModel.mediaId),
131→                mediaModel.url,
132→                mediaModel.title,
133→                mediaType,
134→                mediaModel.mimeType,
135→                mediaModel.uploadDate?.let { dateTimeUtilsWrapper.dateFromIso8601(it).time } ?: 0L
136→            )
137→        }
138→    }
139→
140→    private fun getFromDatabase(mediaType: MediaType): List<MediaItem> {
141→        return when (mediaType) {
142→            IMAGE -> mediaStore.getSiteImages(siteModel)
143→            VIDEO -> mediaStore.getSiteVideos(siteModel)
144→            AUDIO -> mediaStore.getSiteAudio(siteModel)
145→            DOCUMENT -> mediaStore.getSiteDocuments(siteModel)
146→        }.toMediaItems(mediaType)
147→    }
148→
149→    private fun searchInDatabase(mediaType: MediaType, filter: String): List<MediaItem> {
150→        return when (mediaType) {
151→            IMAGE -> mediaStore.searchSiteImages(siteModel, filter)
152→            VIDEO -> mediaStore.searchSiteVideos(siteModel, filter)
153→            AUDIO -> mediaStore.searchSiteAudio(siteModel, filter)
154→            DOCUMENT -> mediaStore.searchSiteDocuments(siteModel, filter)
155→        }.toMediaItems(mediaType)
156→    }
157→
158→    private suspend fun loadPage(siteModel: SiteModel, loadMore: Boolean, filter: MimeType.Type): OnMediaListFetched =
159→        suspendCoroutine { cont ->
160→            loadContinuations[filter] = cont
161→            val payload = FetchMediaListPayload(
162→                siteModel,
163→                NUM_MEDIA_PER_FETCH,
164→                loadMore,
165→                filter
166→            )
167→            dispatcher.dispatch(MediaActionBuilder.newFetchMediaListAction(payload))
168→        }
169→
170→    private fun MediaType.toMimeType(): MimeType.Type {
171→        return when (this) {
172→            IMAGE -> MimeType.Type.IMAGE
173→            VIDEO -> MimeType.Type.VIDEO
174→            AUDIO -> MimeType.Type.AUDIO
175→            DOCUMENT -> MimeType.Type.APPLICATION
176→        }
177→    }
178→
179→    @Subscribe(threadMode = MAIN)
180→    fun onMediaListFetched(event: OnMediaListFetched) {
181→        loadContinuations[event.mimeType]?.resume(event)
182→        loadContinuations.remove(event.mimeType)
183→    }
184→
185→    companion object {
186→        const val NUM_MEDIA_PER_FETCH = 24
187→    }

 330→    private suspend fun reloadPages(state: PageListState = REFRESHING, forced: Boolean = false) {
 331→        if (performIfNetworkAvailableAsync {
 332→                _listState.setOnUi(state)
 333→
 334→                val result = pageStore.requestPagesFromServer(site, forced)
 335→                if (result.isError) {
 336→                    _listState.setOnUi(ERROR)
 337→                    showSnackbar(SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.error_refresh_pages)))
 338→                    AppLog.e(PAGES, "An error occurred while fetching the Pages")
 339→                } else {
 340→                    _listState.setOnUi(DONE)
 341→                }
 342→                refreshPages()
 343→            }) else {
 344→            _listState.setOnUi(DONE)
 345→        }
 346→    }

 398→    fun onSearch(searchQuery: String, delay: Long = SEARCH_DELAY) {
 399→        searchJob?.cancel()
 400→        if (searchQuery.isNotEmpty()) {

 402→                delay(delay)
 403→                searchJob = null
 404→                if (isActive) {
 405→                    _lastSearchQuery = searchQuery
 406→                    val result = groupedSearch(site, searchQuery)

 429→    fun updatePreviewAndDialogState(newState: PostListRemotePreviewState, postInfo: PostInfoType) {
 430→        // We need only transitions, so...
 431→        if (_previewState.value == newState) return
 432→
 433→        // update the state
 434→        val prevState = _previewState.value
 435→        _previewState.postValue(newState)
 436→
 437→        // take care of exit actions on state transition

 442→            this::handleRemotePreview

 446→    private suspend fun groupedSearch(
 447→        site: SiteModel,
 448→        searchQuery: String
 449→    ): SortedMap<PageListType, List<PageModel>> = withContext(defaultDispatcher) {
 450→        val list = pageStore.search(site, searchQuery)
 451→            .groupBy { PageListType.fromPageStatus(it.status) }
 452→
 453→        return@withContext list.toSortedMap { previous, next ->
 454→            when {
 455→                previous == next -> 0
 456→                previous == PUBLISHED -> -1
 457→                next == PUBLISHED -> 1
 458→                previous == DRAFTS -> -1
 459→                next == DRAFTS -> 1
 460→                previous == SCHEDULED -> -1
 461→                next == SCHEDULED -> 1
 462→                else -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Unexpected page type")
 463→            }
 464→        }
 465→    }

 490→    fun onMenuAction(action: PagesListAction, page: Page, context: Context? = null): Boolean {
 491→        when (action) {
 492→            VIEW_PAGE -> previewPage(page)
 493→            SET_PARENT -> setParent(page)
 494→            MOVE_TO_DRAFT -> changePageStatus(page.remoteId, PageStatus.DRAFT)
 495→            MOVE_TO_TRASH -> changePageStatus(page.remoteId, PageStatus.TRASHED)
 496→            PUBLISH_NOW -> publishPageNow(page.remoteId)
 497→            DELETE_PERMANENTLY -> deletePage(page)
 498→            CANCEL_AUTO_UPLOAD -> cancelPendingAutoUpload(LocalId(page.localId))
 499→            SET_AS_HOMEPAGE -> setHomepage(page.remoteId)
 500→            SET_AS_POSTS_PAGE -> setPostsPage(page.remoteId)
 501→            COPY -> onCopyPage(page)
 502→            SHARE -> context?.let { copyPageLink(page, it) }
 503→            PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE -> navigateToBlazeOverlay(page.remoteId)
 504→        }
 505→        return true
 506→    }

 811→                showSnackbar(
 812→                    if (action.undo != null) {

 815→                            UiStringRes(R.string.undo),
 816→                            action.undo!!

 818→                    } else {

 820→                    }
 821→                )

 827→
 828→                showSnackbar(SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.page_parent_change_error)))

 832→        launch {

 886→    private fun changePageStatus(remoteId: Long, status: PageStatus) {
 887→        performIfNetworkAvailable {
 888→            if (status == PageStatus.DRAFT) {
 889→                trackMenuSelectionEvent(MOVE_TO_DRAFT)
 890→            } else if (status == PageStatus.TRASHED) {
 891→                trackMenuSelectionEvent(MOVE_TO_TRASH)
 892→            }
 893→
 894→            pageMap[remoteId]?.let { page ->
 895→                val oldStatus = page.status
 896→
 897→                val action = if (status != PageStatus.TRASHED || remoteId > 0) {
 898→                    // this is executed when a page is moved to
 899→                    PageAction(remoteId, UPLOAD) {
 900→                        val updatedPage = updatePageStatus(page, status)
 901→                        pageStore.updatePageInDb(updatedPage)
 902→                        _scrollToPage.postOnUi(updatedPage)
 903→                        pageStore.uploadPageToServer(updatedPage)
 904→                    }
 905→                } else {
 906→                    // Local pages are trashed locally
 907→                    PageAction(remoteId, UPDATE) {
 908→                        val updatedPage = updatePageStatus(page, status)
 909→                        pageStore.updatePageInDb(updatedPage)
 910→                        // should we scroll to the trash page - probably
 911→                        _scrollToPage.postOnUi(updatedPage)
 912→                    }
 913→                }
 914→
 915→                action.undo = {
 916→                    val updatedPage = updatePageStatus(page.copy(remoteId = action.remoteId), oldStatus)
 917→                    launch(defaultDispatcher) {
 918→                        pageStore.updatePageInDb(updatedPage)
 919→                        updatePageMap(updatedPage)
 920→                        pageStore.uploadPageToServer(updatedPage)
 921→                    }
 922→                }
 923→
 924→                action.onSuccess = {
 925→                    launch(defaultDispatcher) {
 926→                        delay(ACTION_DELAY)
 927→
 928→                        val message = prepareStatusChangeSnackbar(status, action.undo)
 929→                        showSnackbar(message)
 930→                    }
 931→                }
 932→                action.onError = {
 933→                    launch(defaultDispatcher) {
 934→                        action.undo?.let { it() }
 935→
 936→                        showSnackbar(SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.page_status_change_error)))
 937→                    }
 938→                }
 939→
 940→                launch {
 941→                    _arePageActionsEnabled = false
 942→                    actionPerformer.performAction(action)
 943→                    _arePageActionsEnabled = true
 944→                }
 945→            }
 946→        }
 947→    }

 957→    private fun prepareStatusChangeSnackbar(newStatus: PageStatus, undo: (() -> Unit)? = null): SnackbarMessageHolder {

 959→            PageStatus.DRAFT -> R.string.page_moved_to_draft
 960→            PageStatus.PUBLISHED -> R.string.page_moved_to_published
 961→            PageStatus.TRASHED -> R.string.page_moved_to_trash
 962→            PageStatus.SCHEDULED -> R.string.page_moved_to_scheduled
 963→            else -> throw NotImplementedError("Status change to ${newStatus.getTitle()} not supported")
 964→        }
 965→
 966→        return if (undo != null) {
 967→            SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(message), UiStringRes(R.string.undo), undo)
 968→        } else {
 969→            SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(message))
 970→        }
 971→    }

1012→    /**
1013→     * Filtering by author is disable on:
1014→     * 1) Self-hosted sites - The XMLRPC api doesn't support filtering by author.
1015→     * 2) Jetpack sites - we need to pass in the self-hosted user id to be able to filter for authors
1016→     * which we currently can't
1017→     * 3) Sites on which the user doesn't have permissions to edit posts of other users.
1018→     * 4) Single user sites - there is no point in filtering by author on single user sites.
1019→     *
1020→     * This behavior is consistent with Calypso and Posts as of 11/4/2019.
1021→     */
1022→    private val isFilteringByAuthorSupported: Boolean by lazy {

1037→        _authorUIState.value = _authorUIState.value?.copy(

1045→
1046→            AnalyticsUtils.trackWithSiteDetails(
1047→                PAGES_LIST_AUTHOR_FILTER_CHANGED,

172→            WEEK -> selectedTrafficGranularityManager.setSelectedTrafficGranularity(StatsGranularity.WEEKS)
173→            MONTH -> selectedTrafficGranularityManager.setSelectedTrafficGranularity(StatsGranularity.MONTHS)

179→    @Suppress("ComplexMethod", "LongParameterList")
180→    fun start(
181→        localSiteId: Int,
182→        launchedFrom: StatsLaunchedFrom?,
183→        initialSection: StatsSection?,
184→        initialSelectedPeriod: String?,
185→        restart: Boolean,
186→        notificationType: NotificationType?,
187→        granularity: StatsGranularity? = null
188→    ) {
189→        if (restart) {
190→            selectedDateProvider.clear()
191→        }
192→        // Check if VM is not already initialized
193→        if (!isInitialized || restart) {
194→            isInitialized = true
195→
196→            analyticsTracker.trackStatsAccessed(
197→                site = statsSiteProvider.siteModel,
198→                tapSource = launchedFrom?.value ?: ""
199→            )
200→
201→            initialSection?.let {
202→                statsSectionManager.setSelectedSection(it)
203→
204→                val trafficGranularity = it.toStatsGranularity()
205→                if (statsTrafficSubscribersTabsFeatureConfig.isEnabled() && trafficGranularity != null) {
206→                    selectedTrafficGranularityManager.setSelectedTrafficGranularity(trafficGranularity)
207→                }
208→            }
209→            granularity?.let {
210→                if (it != selectedTrafficGranularityManager.getSelectedTrafficGranularity()) {
211→                    selectedTrafficGranularityManager.setSelectedTrafficGranularity(it)
212→                }
213→            }
214→            updateSelectedSectionByTrafficSubscribersTabFeatureConfig()
215→            trackSectionSelected(statsSectionManager.getSelectedSection())
216→
217→            val initialGranularity = granularity ?: initialSection?.toStatsGranularity()
218→            if (initialGranularity != null && initialSelectedPeriod != null) {
219→                selectedDateProvider.setInitialSelectedPeriod(initialGranularity, initialSelectedPeriod)
220→            }
221→
222→            if (launchedFrom == StatsLaunchedFrom.WIDGET) {
223→                analyticsTracker.track(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.STATS_WIDGET_TAPPED, statsSiteProvider.siteModel)
224→            }
225→
226→            if (notificationType != null) {
227→                notificationsTracker.trackTappedNotification(notificationType)
228→            }
229→        }
230→
231→        _statsModuleUiModel.value = Event(buildShowStatsEnabledViewUiModel())
232→
233→        val siteChanged = statsSiteProvider.start(localSiteId)
234→        if (!isStatsModuleEnabled()) {
235→            _statsModuleUiModel.value = Event(buildShowStatsDisabledViewUiModel())
236→        } else {
237→            if (restart && siteChanged) {
238→                launch {
239→                    listUseCases.forEach { useCase ->
240→                        useCase.value.onCleared()
241→                        useCase.value.refreshData(true)
242→                    }
243→                }
244→            }
245→        }
246→
247→        if (BuildConfig.IS_JETPACK_APP) {
248→            updateRevampedInsights()
249→        }
250→
251→        if (jetpackBrandingUtils.shouldShowJetpackPoweredBottomSheet()) showJetpackPoweredBottomSheet()
252→
253→        if (jetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil.shouldShowFeatureSpecificJetpackOverlay(STATS))
254→            showJetpackOverlay()
255→    }

280→    private fun updateRevampedInsights() {

282→        insightsUseCase?.launch(defaultDispatcher) {
283→            val insightTypes = statsStore.getAddedInsights(statsSiteProvider.siteModel)
284→            if (insightTypes.containsAll(DEFAULT_INSIGHTS)) { // means not upgraded to new insights
285→                // The new set of default cards is added at the top of their list and preserve their additions
286→                val addedInsightTypes = insightTypes - DEFAULT_INSIGHTS.toSet()
287→                val updateInsightTypes: MutableSet<InsightType> = mutableSetOf()
288→                updateInsightTypes.addAll(JETPACK_DEFAULT_INSIGHTS)

291→                insightsUseCase.loadData()

27→class StatsDetailViewModel
28→@Inject constructor(
29→    @Named(UI_THREAD) mainDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
30→    @Named(BLOCK_DETAIL_USE_CASE) private val detailUseCase: BaseListUseCase,
31→    private val statsSiteProvider: StatsSiteProvider,
32→    private val statsPostProvider: StatsPostProvider,
33→    private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper,
34→    private val analyticsTrackerWrapper: AnalyticsTrackerWrapper,
35→    private val jetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil: JetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil
36→) : ScopedViewModel(mainDispatcher) {
37→    private val _isRefreshing = MutableLiveData<Boolean>()
38→    val isRefreshing: LiveData<Boolean> = _isRefreshing
39→
40→    private val _showSnackbarMessage = mergeNotNull(
41→        detailUseCase.snackbarMessage,
42→        distinct = true,
43→        singleEvent = true
44→    )
45→    val showSnackbarMessage: LiveData<SnackbarMessageHolder> = _showSnackbarMessage
46→
47→    private val _showJetpackOverlay = MutableLiveData<Event<Boolean>>()
48→    val showJetpackOverlay: LiveData<Event<Boolean>> = _showJetpackOverlay
49→
50→    fun init(
51→        postId: Long,
52→        postType: String,
53→        postTitle: String,
54→        postUrl: String?
55→    ) {
56→        analyticsTrackerWrapper.trackStatsAccessed(
57→            statsSiteProvider.siteModel,
58→            StatsLaunchedFrom.POSTS.value
59→        )
60→
61→        statsPostProvider.init(postId, postType, postTitle, postUrl)
62→
63→        if (jetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil.shouldShowFeatureSpecificJetpackOverlay(
64→                JetpackOverlayConnectedFeature.STATS)) {
65→            showJetpackOverlay()
66→        }
67→    }
68→
69→    private fun showJetpackOverlay() {
70→        _showJetpackOverlay.value = Event(true)
71→    }
72→
73→    fun refresh() {
74→        launch {
75→            detailUseCase.refreshData(true)
76→            _isRefreshing.value = false
77→        }
78→    }
79→
80→    override fun onCleared() {
81→        super.onCleared()
82→        detailUseCase.onCleared()
83→        statsPostProvider.clear()
84→    }
85→
86→    @SuppressLint("NullSafeMutableLiveData")
87→    fun onPullToRefresh() {
88→        _showSnackbarMessage.value = null
89→        statsSiteProvider.clear()
90→        if (networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()) {
91→            refresh()
92→        } else {
93→            _isRefreshing.value = false
94→            _showSnackbarMessage.value = SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_title))
95→        }
96→    }
97→}
